reviews.review_title: Samsung Galaxy S7 Edge Can't play..
reviews.review_description: I just paid for this one yesterday and unfortunately I can't play it on my Samsung Galaxy S7 Edge with all the lag in the game there's really no point in trying anymore I was looking forward to playing it and now I'm stuck with a game that I can't play and I'll probably won't get a refund...
Good game
Good graphics and good gameplay nice in cockpit gameplay

So much action packed but no VR nausea at all. Great achievement.
Finally we got a VR game that gives full game experience.
Recommended! My score is 10/10
so far so good
Upset that you have to have a gamepad instead of the controller. I purchased it and can't play it
It won't work ...not happy
I really like this game i just suck at it.

I would really think the game play would be improved if you could also turn the choppers with the right control stick as it is unused for other control function. The whole head tilt thing give me motion sickness much quicker. I am sure it would take little programming for the next update.

Not a bad game but after playing a number of times I find the dialog inane and the womans voice extremely irritating especially when you crash and she says dylan nooooo. I turn the volume all the way down so I don’t have to hear it.

Please relise update with costumizable controls.
I play with a vr box (like many others) I like to play using one hand..let me choice button.
 I have the boost and no missiles or up and down!!
No problem with look to fly but I have 3 button off and no way to rise of fall
Fix this simple option and 5 star

Really a 5 star game. But change the way you do? Rudder control put on the joypad please, rudder on your head ? A no no on the rudder controls the way you did it 1 star, sorry for that. What br game is next thanks from michael taylor cornwall.

reviews.review_title: Lost a star because I lost my progress
reviews.review_description:
I read all the way through the normal difficulty level on both campaigns, but got my new phone and poof. Yeah I backed up, but somehow i've lost a year's worth of play (I don't pick it up everyday) 

This sucks! Fix it!
Really disappointed that the Samsung controller doesnt work with this. Having to buy a seperate gamepad make for it an expensive game.
Which game controller can i use????

developer_response.body:
sunnymbbs2007,

Android and Gear VR certified bluethooth controller would be fine. Game is compatiblity tested with SteelSeries Stratus XL, JOYTRON EX BAND, Xiami Bluetooth Gamepad and Samsung Gamepad.

reviews.review_description: Great game for VR. Graphics are top. I think it is a really good game for the GO.
It's free to move around and shooting, like GTA style. It would be excellent if this company produce real GTA style game.

This game could be one on the best gear vr titles but the current control setup makes it very unintuitive. Please, PLEASE! Patch in rotation to the x axis of the right analog stick. Why on earth they went with the head tilt is beyond me.

And to follow up on a comment from the developers in another user review. They claim turning with the right stick induces serious nausea. This is total bs. I am a day one Vive owner and there are a ton of flight games that use this control setup. And a couple space games on the gear vr itself. Hey devs, makr it an option for those of us who want it. Option in games only make them better.
Unreal helicopter control but amusing

reviews.review_title: Smoke on the water, fire in the sky!
reviews.review_description: Actionpacked gameplay, good graphics, smooth controls with gamepad. Please add more missions, I would like to pay for this!
